# Zotero Upstream Deep-Verification Report

## Summary

6/6 targets **hold**. Contracts broken on release: **0**. Broken on beta: **0**. Broken on dev (main): **0**. All inferred behavioral contracts are preserved across release (9.0.4), beta (9.0), and dev (main / 10.0.SOURCE @ dcf5010). Two targets carry dev-tier internal refactors that relocate logic without breaking observable contracts (tracked below).

## Release-affecting (act now)

None. No target breaks on release (9.0.4) or beta (9.0). No product code change is required for release safety.

## Dev radar (track only)

Logic relocated on `main` only; observable contracts still hold. **Product code must NOT change for these** — they are watchlist anchor-mapping updates, not behavioral breaks.

- **item-tree-duplicate-selection** — The duplicate-selection override moved out of `chrome/content/zotero/itemTree.jsx` (`_handleSelectionChange`, which now only debounces) into the `CollectionViewItemTree` subclass at `chrome/content/zotero/collectionViewItemTree.jsx:1553-1567`. Both contracts hold there: set-expansion via `getSetItemsByItemID(itemID)` (C1) and gating via `isDuplicates() && selection.count == 1 && duplicateMouseSelection` (C2). Only diff is defensive optional chaining (`collectionTreeRow?.isDuplicates()`). Documented anchor (`itemTree.jsx _handleSelectionChange`) no longer carries the logic on main; watchlist anchor mapping should be repointed to `collectionViewItemTree.jsx`.

- **collection-tree-row-duplicates-search-object** — Caching relocated from the global `Zotero.CollectionTreeCache` to a per-instance cache (`this._cachedSearch/_cachedResults/_cachedTempTable` + new `clearCache()`); `getSearchObject` now early-returns `this._cachedSearch` if set. Additive and benign: Zoplicate patches `Zotero.Duplicates.prototype.getSearchObject` (the inner `this.ref.getSearchObject()`), not `CollectionTreeRow.getSearchObject`, and reads only `isDuplicates()` / `.ref.libraryID`. C1/C2/C3 preserved; the new `clearCache()` reinforces the temp-table cleanup lifecycle. No anchor remap required, but note the cache-source change in the watch evidence.

Additional benign dev-tier internal refactors (no anchor remap needed, contracts intact): `duplicates-merge-pane-merge` and `duplicates-merge-pane-set-master` now read the source clone from `this._infoBox.item` (and `set-master` shares one clone across info/abstract boxes), with `CollectionTreeCache.clear()` moved out of `merge()`; Zoplicate does its own cache clear. `duplicates-merge-pane-set-items` now extends `ItemPaneContainerBase` using `this.querySelector`/`this._infoBox` instead of `document.getElementById`, but `#zotero-duplicates-merge-button` is still wrapped in `<groupbox>` and `setItems` validation is unchanged.

## Proposed watchlist additions

- **item-tree-duplicate-selection (anchor remap)** — Add `chrome/content/zotero/collectionViewItemTree.jsx` (`CollectionViewItemTree._handleSelectionChange` and `_handleRowMouseUpDown`, ~lines 1550-1567) as the dev-tier anchor; demote/keep `chrome/content/zotero/itemTree.jsx _handleSelectionChange` as a release/beta-only anchor. Contracts unchanged.
- **collection-tree-row-duplicates-search-object (evidence note)** — No new file target; annotate the watch evidence that on dev the cache backing moved from global `Zotero.CollectionTreeCache` to per-instance `_cachedSearch/_cachedResults/_cachedTempTable` + `clearCache()`. Verify still keys on the inner `Zotero.Duplicates.prototype.getSearchObject` patch surface, not `CollectionTreeRow.getSearchObject`.

(No `suggested_new_target` stubs for a brand-new feature surface; both items above are anchor/evidence refinements to existing targets.)

## Recommended next step

update watchlist + re-run check, no product change
